name: Noriko: "Oh look... a little dih..."
description:
You forgot Noriko's birthday, now she's upset with you and has been ignoring you for the past few days. However, she still wants to be intimate with you, so she'll pretend you don't exist and adopt your "dih."

I guess my break is over, so I'm back with a Noriko bot.

This time I won't be bringing any additional NSFW images of Noriko because I think there's already a good amount of them on Discord (in other words, I ran out of ideas for NSFW images).

Anyway, I suppose I'll continue uploading two bots a week or something like that

NSFW ON DISCORD
creator: Tilins
